title: Character Counter
shortDescription: Count every character in your text, including spaces and punctuation, with an immediate result.
metaDescription: Count characters in text, including spaces and punctuation, and get a clear total instantly.
intro: Paste or type your text to see the exact character total, including spaces and punctuation.
overview:
Use this tool when you need the exact length of a text block, headline, message, or product line. It gives one clear total for the full text you enter, so you can compare versions or check whether something fits a limit.

The count reflects the characters in the content you submit. If you change even a single letter, space, or punctuation mark, the total changes too. That makes it useful for drafts where every symbol matters.

For the most reliable reading, enter only the text you want measured. If you are comparing variants, test each version separately so the totals are easy to interpret.
howItWorks: Enter the text you want to measure.
The tool counts the characters in the text you provided.
Read the total and compare it with other versions if needed.

useCases.title: Headline length check
useCases.description: Measure a headline before publishing so you can keep it within the space you planned for.

useCases.title: Social post drafting
useCases.description: Check the length of a post, caption, or bio while refining wording line by line.

useCases.title: Field limit verification
useCases.description: Confirm that a username, title, or form entry stays within a required character limit.

useCases.title: Version comparison
useCases.description: Compare two drafts of the same message and see how small wording changes affect length.

examples.title: Title with punctuation
examples.description: Shows that punctuation and spaces are part of the final count.

faq.question: Does the count include spaces?
faq.answer: Yes. Spaces are counted as characters, so adding or removing one changes the total.

faq.question: Are punctuation marks counted too?
faq.answer: Yes. Commas, periods, apostrophes, symbols, and emojis all affect the total.

faq.question: Why does my count differ from another editor?
faq.answer: Different tools may handle line breaks, invisible characters, or pasted formatting differently. Compare the same plain text input when possible.

faq.question: What is the best way to check a limit?
faq.answer: Paste only the final text you intend to use, then compare the total with the limit you need to meet.
